zh.OF, CHESTER, CHESHIRE, ENGLAND: 英國英格蘭爾切斯特布拉可
zh.The Engineer: 加拿大卑詩省斯迪金 雷吉恩吉尼爾
zh.The Abbey Church, Chester, Cheshire, Eng: 英國英格蘭爾切斯特布拉可
zh.lifeSummary: Richard Lenginour於1260年出生在英國英格蘭。他於大約1289年與Agnes FitzRichard de Pulford在英國英格蘭爾切斯特布拉可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1310年在英國英格蘭爾切斯特布拉可享年50歲，埋葬在加拿大卑詩省斯迪金 雷吉恩吉尼爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Lenginour于1260年出生在英国英格兰。他于大约1289年与Agnes FitzRichard de Pulford在英国英格兰爾切斯特布拉可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1310年在英国英格兰爾切斯特布拉可享年50岁，埋葬在加拿大卑诗省斯迪金 雷吉恩吉尼爾。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard Lenginour was born in 1260, in England, United Kingdom. He married Agnes FitzRichard de Pulford about 1289, in Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1310, in Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50, and was buried in Engineer, Stikine Region, British Columbia, Canada.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Lenginour est né en 1260, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Agnes FitzRichard de Pulford environ 1289, à Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1310, à Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Engineer, Stikine Region, Colombie-Britannique, Canada.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Lenginourは1260年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた。約1289年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターブラコンでAgnes FitzRichard de Pulfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1310年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターブラコンで50歳で死去し，カナダブリティッシュ コロンビア州スティキン レジオンエンジンイールにて埋葬された。

ko.The Engineer: 캐나다 브리티시 컬럼비아 스티킨 레조 잉이니어
ko.lifeSummary: Richard Lenginour(은)는 1260년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1289년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터 블라콘에서 Agnes FitzRichard de Pulford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1310년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터 블라콘에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 캐나다 브리티시 컬럼비아 스티킨 레조 잉이니어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Lenginour nasceu em 1260, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Agnes FitzRichard de Pulford aproximadamente 1289, em Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1310, em Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Engineer, Stikine Region, Colômbia Britânica, Canadá.

ru.The Engineer: энгаинир, стикаин регион, Британская Колумбия, Канада
ru.lifeSummary: Richard Lenginour родился в 1260 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes FitzRichard de Pulford около 1289 г. в местности блакон, честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1310 г. в местности блакон, честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности энгаинир, стикаин регион, Британская Колумбия, Канада.
